capability_plan.action: Increase non-blocking collectors and connector reuse.
Tune retry windows, jitter, and transient-error handling.
Calibrate concurrency with adaptive workload backpressure.
Strengthen module contracts and discovery validation.
Expand connector orchestration to leverage high-value multi-source collectors safely.
Expand analyst outputs with richer graph/report artifacts.
Close regression gaps around failure paths and adapters.

recommended_filters.title: Anomaly Detection Filter
recommended_filters.description: Flags inconsistent naming and one-off identity artifacts across discovered accounts.

recommended_filters.title: Contact Canonicalizer
recommended_filters.description: Normalizes and deduplicates email/phone artifacts into canonical forms.

recommended_filters.title: Entity Name Resolver
recommended_filters.description: Extracts likely full-name entities from biography snippets and profile descriptions.

recommended_filters.title: Exposure Tier Matrix
recommended_filters.description: Assigns low/medium/high exposure tiers based on extracted artifacts and findings.

recommended_filters.title: Mailbox Provider Profiler
recommended_filters.description: Separates public/free mailbox providers from custom domains in contact artifacts.

recommended_filters.title: Module Filter Router
recommended_filters.description: Routes filter strategies using cataloged filter-like modules from source-intel trees.

recommended_filters.title: Noise Suppression Filter
recommended_filters.description: Marks low-signal rows and placeholder artifacts to improve scan readability.

recommended_filters.title: PII Signal Classifier
recommended_filters.description: Classifies extracted artifacts into personal data classes for analyst triage.

recommended_filters.title: Sensitive Lexicon Guard
recommended_filters.description: Flags sensitive personal-information phrases in bios and profile context text.

recommended_filters.title: Signal Lane Fusion
recommended_filters.description: Deduplicates and prioritizes connector-derived signals into actionable intelligence lanes.
